member.name: T:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.AssemblyGenerator
member.summary: Use to compile C# code to in memory assemblies using the Roslyn compiler

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.AssemblyGenerator.ReferenceAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Tells Roslyn to reference the given assembly and any of its dependencies when compiling code

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.AssemblyGenerator.ReferenceAssemblyContainingType``1
member.summary: Reference the assembly containing the type "T"

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.AssemblyGenerator.Generate(System.Action{JasperFx.CodeGeneration.ISourceWriter})
member.summary: Compile code built up by using an ISourceWriter to a new assembly in memory

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.AssemblyGenerator.Generate(System.String)
member.summary: Compile the code passed into this method to a new assembly in memory

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.CodeFileExtensions.InitializeSynchronously(JasperFx.CodeGeneration.ICodeFile,JasperFx.CodeGeneration.GenerationRules,JasperFx.CodeGeneration.ICodeFileCollection,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Initialize dynamic code compilation by either loading the expected type from the supplied assembly or dynamically generating and compiling the code on demand

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.CodeFileExtensions.AssertAllGeneratedCodeCanCompile(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Validate all of the Wolverine configuration of this Wolverine application. This checks that all of the known generated code elements are valid

member.name: T:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.Scenarios.CodegenScenario
member.summary: Helper class to quickly exercise and test out custom Frame classes

member.name: M:JasperFx.RuntimeCompiler.Scenarios.CodegenScenario.ForBaseOf``1(System.Action{JasperFx.CodeGeneration.GeneratedType,JasperFx.CodeGeneration.GeneratedMethod},JasperFx.CodeGeneration.GenerationRules)
member.summary: Generate a new method for the basic base class. The base class "TObject" should only have a single declared method
